items.title: [NH, MA, RI, CT, DE, NY, NJ, PA, or FL, Inbranch] Santander $400 Checking Bonus

items.title: [YMMV] Capital One Shopping: Preferred Hotels, Spend $330+ & Get $100 Back – Stack With AmEx Offer
